# Hemreform Malmö

> Architecture, total renovations, project management, prime kitchens and bathrooms, custom carpentry and metal constructions in Malmo — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. From first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout. RUT/ROT.

> Hemreform erbjuder arkitektur, totalrenoveringar, projektledning, prime kök och badrum, specialsnickeri och metallkonstruktioner i Malmö — för bostäder, lägenheter och lokaler. Från idé till nyckelklart. En ansvarig kontakt. RUT/ROT.

## Contact

- Website: https://malmo.hemreform.se/
- Email: info@hemreform.se
- Phone: +46 73 656 64 89
- Location: Malmö, Sweden

Brand: Hemreform. This site is Hemreform Malmö, part of the Hemreform network.

## Services

- Totalrenovering & projektledning — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arkitektur & design — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Prime kök & badrum — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Specialsnickeri & metallkonstruktioner — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Tekniska kontroller & tillstånd — technical checks, permit coordination and certified specialist procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://malmo.hemreform.se/): Architecture, total renovation services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/): Guides on total renovation, project planning, permits, kitchens, bathrooms and custom carpentry for Malmö

## Blog Articles

- [Badrumsrenovering bostadsrätt Malmö](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-bostadsratt-malmo/): Bathroom renovation in a housing cooperative in Malmö: HOA approval, waterproofing, certification, drains, ROT and what to know before starting.
- [Badrumsrenovering i Malmö – Pris, ROT & planering](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-malmo-pris-planering/): Planning a bathroom renovation in Malmö? Price examples, ROT deduction, waterproofing requirements and step-by-step guide.
- [Badrumsrenovering Malmö pris 2026](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-malmo-pris/): What does a bathroom renovation cost in Malmö 2026? Price ranges, ROT deduction, waterproofing, HOA rules and what drives the cost.
- [Bygglov eller anmälan renovering Malmö](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/bygglov-anmalan-renovering-malmo/): Do you need building permits or notification for your renovation in Malmö? Guide covering layout changes, load-bearing walls, ventilation and when startbesked is required.
- [Bygglov och anmälan vid renovering i Malmö – Regler](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/bygglov-renovering-malmo/): What requires a building permit when renovating in Malmö? Guide on PBL, building notification, Attefall and Malmö's 2025 regulations. Avoid costly mistakes.
- [Köksrenovering bostadsrätt Malmö | BRF-regler](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-bostadsratt-malmo/): Guide to kitchen renovation in a bostadsrätt in Malmö. BRF approval, ventilation rules, electrical requirements and what triggers building notification.
- [Köksrenovering i Malmö – Pris & planeringsguide](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-malmo-guide/): Everything about kitchen renovation in Malmö: costs 2026, materials, ventilation, ROT deduction and planning tips for a successful kitchen project.
- [Köksrenovering Malmö pris 2026](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-malmo-pris/): Price guide for kitchen renovation in Malmö 2026: material choices, layout, plumbing, electricity, ROT deduction and budget tips.
- [Lägenhetsrenovering Malmö | Pris & planering](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/lagenhetsrenovering-malmo/): Renovating an apartment in Malmö? Cost per sqm, timeline, HOA rules, ROT deduction and smart prioritisation for kitchen, bathroom and surfaces.
- [Renovera bostadsrätt i Malmö – Regler & styrelsebesked](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/renovera-bostadsratt-malmo/): What can you renovate in your bostadsrätt in Malmö? Guide on BRF rules, board approval, moisture liability and ROT deductions.
- [ROT-avdrag i Malmö 2026 – Regler & maxbelopp](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/rot-avdrag-malmo-2026/): Everything about the ROT deduction in Malmö 2026. How much you can deduct, which works qualify and how to apply with Skatteverket.
- [Renovera sekelskifteslägenhet Malmö](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/sekelskifteslagenhet-renovering-malmo/): Guide to renovating a turn-of-the-century apartment in Malmö: stucco, original parquet, BRF rules and how to modernise without destroying character.
- [Specialsnickeri i Malmö – Platsbyggda lösningar](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/specialsnickeri-malmo/): Custom carpentry in Malmö: built-in wardrobes, kitchen cabinets, bookshelves and bespoke storage solutions for all home types.
- [Total lägenhetsrenovering i Malmö – Kostnad & steg](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/totalrenovering-lagenhet-malmo/): Planning a full apartment renovation in Malmö? Price examples per sqm, timeline and what requires building notification. Guide from Hemreform Malmö.
- [Totalrenovering Malmö pris per kvm 2026](https://malmo.hemreform.se/blogg/totalrenovering-malmo-pris/): What does a full renovation cost in Malmö? Price per sqm, process, ROT deduction, project management and common mistakes to avoid.
